days.summary: OpenAI shipped GPT-5.5, positioning it as a new agent-oriented model for ChatGPT and Codex that can understand complex goals, use tools, check its own work, and carry tasks further to completion. DeepSeek open-sourced DeepSeek-V4 Preview with up to 1M-token context, including DeepSeek-V4-Pro at 1.6T total parameters with 49B active and DeepSeek-V4-Flash at 284B total with 13B active. xAI also launched Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0, claiming the top spot on Tau Voice Bench for complex multi-step voice workflows.
